Notice Of Motion For Relief From Dismissal
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Capital One Bank Motion for Relief From Dismissal filed on 12/11/2008 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal is ordered vacated. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for Case Management Conference on 7/31/2009 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353. (212)
